summary: Iteration 50: Dark Premium Theme Redesign Testing Complete. All core features working. Homepage, navigation, trust bar, division cards, catalog pages, product detail, chat widget, footer, and admin login all verified. One design issue found on About page.

issues: Section has light background (#FAFAFA) which breaks the dark theme
Title 'The Agile Ortho Advantage' is white text on light background - unreadable
Cards in this section have dark backgrounds but the section wrapper is light
design_issues.fix_suggestion: Change bg-[#FAFAFA] to bg-[#0A0A0A] or similar dark color in About.jsx line 71

action_items: Fix About page 'Why Choose Us' section background from #FAFAFA to dark color (#0A0A0A)
critical_code_review_comments: About.jsx line 71: bg-[#FAFAFA] breaks dark theme - should be bg-[#0A0A0A]
About.jsx line 75: text-white on light background is unreadable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark premium theme redesign verified. All pages working except About page has one section with light background breaking the theme. Homepage shows 810+ products, 13 divisions, gold 'Devices' text, search bar, trust badges all readable. Chat widget opens with dark theme, responds to 'hello' with greeting. Catalog pages show dark cards with teal product count badges. Footer has gold section headers. Admin login works.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Dark background, gold 'Devices' text, search bar visible
homepage.navigation: PASS - Products, Districts, About, Contact, AI Assistant, Shop links all readable
homepage.trust_bar: PASS - 4 badges (ISO 13485, CDSCO, Meril Authorized, 33 Districts) readable
homepage.division_cards: PASS - 13 divisions with teal product count badges
homepage.featured_products: PASS - Product images with gold division labels
homepage.footer: PASS - Gold section headers, quick links, districts, compliance, copyright readable

catalog.division_navigation: PASS - Clicking division card navigates to /catalog/{slug}
catalog.catalog_division_page: PASS - Sidebar categories, product grid with dark cards
catalog.product_detail_page: PASS - Specs, breadcrumbs, brand badges readable

chat_widget.greeting_response: PASS - Responds to 'hello' with greeting (not 'No Match')

about_page.hero: PASS - Dark theme, Meril Life Sciences section visible
about_page.why_choose_us: FAIL - Light background (#FAFAFA) breaks dark theme

admin.login: PASS - Password login works, redirects to dashboard
